title: daphne alba subsp. anhuiensis
intro: Daphne alba subsp. anhuiensis, also known as Anhui White Daphne, is a plant species belonging to the genus Daphne in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as acting as a diuretic and expectorant. In traditional Chinese medicine, Daphne alba subsp. anhuiensis is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
